justification: The candidate clearly demonstrates all must-have skills except TypeScript, and none of the nice-to-have skills are mentioned. The candidate's experience is relevant, but there is no mention of a portfolio or live project links.
gaps: No experience with design systems/component libraries
suggestions: Can you provide examples of projects where you used TypeScript?
Have you used any state management libraries like Redux or Zustand?
What testing frameworks have you used in your projects?
Can you describe your experience with web accessibility and WCAG?
How have you optimized performance in your projects?
What build tools have you used in your projects?
Have you worked with any design systems or component libraries?
